24 Hour Emergency Plumbing in Lahore

Acme Plumbing has served Lahore homeowners since 2008. Our licensed plumbers respond within 30 minutes anywhere in Gulberg, DHA, Model Town, and Johar Town. We handle burst pipes, blocked drains, geyser repairs, and gas leak detection. Every job carries a 90-day workmanship warranty.

Services we offer

  • Emergency burst pipe repair
  • Blocked drain unblocking
  • Gas leak detection and repair
  • Geyser installation
  • Bathroom and kitchen renovation plumbing

Why Lahore homeowners choose us

Three reasons: speed (30-minute response in central neighborhoods), licensing (Punjab plumbing trade license #PL-2008-441), and warranty (90 days on every job).

Service area

We serve Gulberg I, II, III, IV, V; DHA Phases 1-9; Model Town; Johar Town; Iqbal Town; Faisal Town; and parts of Cantonment.

What about emergencies outside these neighborhoods?

For emergencies more than 15 km from Gulberg we may charge a small travel fee. Call us and we will quote it before dispatching.

Contact

Phone: +92 300 123 4567

Address: Main Boulevard 12, Gulberg, Lahore 54000
